Docs.summary: Describes the credential parameters for accessing the source registry.

MemberSignature.Value: public ContainerRegistryTaskSourceRegistryCredentials ();
.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor() cil managed
Public Sub New ()
public string Identity { get; set; }
.property instance string Identity
Public Property Identity As String
member this.Identity : string with get, set

Docs.summary: The Entra identity used for source registry login. The value is `[system]` for system-assigned managed identity, `[caller]` for caller identity, and client ID for user-assigned managed identity.

MemberSignature.Value: public Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerRegistry.Tasks.Models.ContainerRegistryTaskSourceRegistryLoginMode? LoginMode { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<valuetype Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerRegistry.Tasks.Models.ContainerRegistryTaskSourceRegistryLoginMode> LoginMode
Public Property LoginMode As Nullable(Of ContainerRegistryTaskSourceRegistryLoginMode)
member this.LoginMode : Nullable<Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerRegistry.Tasks.Models.ContainerRegistryTaskSourceRegistryLoginMode> with get, set

Docs.summary: The authentication mode which determines the source registry login scope. The credentials for the source registry will be generated using the given scope. These credentials will be used to login to the source registry during the run.
